/usr/bin/c++ -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -O3 -g -fPIC -march=native -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -L/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -L/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib CMakeFiles/SparseTeste.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o SparseTeste   -L/Library/gurobi1203/macos_universal2/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Library/gurobi1203/macos_universal2/lib -Wl,-rpath,"/Users/igor/Documents/[08] Projetos/[16]_DW_Decomp/cmake/DW_Decomp" -Wl,-rpath,"/Users/igor/Documents/[08] Projetos/[16]_DW_Decomp/cmake/Grafo" ../DW_Decomp/libDwDecomp.dylib ../Grafo/libGrafo.dylib -lgurobi_c++ -lgurobi
